phoneVerify.subtitle: We sent a verification code to

errors.locked: Too many attempts. Request a new code
errors.expired: Code expired. Request a new code
errors.rateLimited: Too many codes sent. Try again later

delete.title: Delete account
delete.intro: This permanently deletes your account and personal data. This cannot be undone.

consequences.profile: Your profile, vehicles, chats, ratings and saved settings are deleted.
consequences.media: Your uploaded photos and verification documents are removed.
consequences.retained: Past order and payment records are kept (anonymized) as required by law, with no link to you.

delete.error: Could not delete your account. Please try again or contact support.
delete.webLoggedInIntro: You are signed in. You can delete your account and data below.
delete.webInstructions: To delete your MULU account, sign in to the app, then open Settings → Delete account. You can also email us and we will process the deletion.
delete.webRetained: We delete your profile, photos and personal data. Past order and payment records are retained in anonymized form (no link to you) as required by law.

moderation.reported: Reported. Our team will review it.
moderation.blocked: User blocked. You won't see their messages.
moderation.blockedBanner: You blocked this user. Messages are hidden.

camera.iosStandalone: If the camera doesn't open, open this page in Safari instead of the home-screen app.
camera.permissionDenied: Camera access is required. Enable it in your device settings to take photos.
camera.noCamera: No camera was found on this device.
camera.unsupported: The in-app camera isn't supported on this device.
camera.hint: Photos are captured inside the app and uploaded securely. They are never saved to your device gallery.

auth.welcomeBackSub: Great to see you again. Let's get your car sparkling.

errors.emailNotConfirmed: Email not confirmed. Check your inbox and click the link we sent you
errors.networkError: Network error. Check your connection and try again

errors.emailInUse: That email is already registered. Sign in or reset your password.

checkout.title: Payment
checkout.secureBody: Payment runs on a PCI-secured page over an encrypted connection. Card details go straight to the clearing company. We never see or store your card number.

checkout.linkError: We couldn't load the payment page
checkout.terminalPendingNote: Clearing runs through a licensed, secured payment company

ladder.top: You're at the top tier. Thank you for your great work!

banner.up: 🎉 Your rating improved to {{stars}} ★. You now earn {{payout}} ₪ per wash.
banner.down: Your rating is now {{stars}} ★. You earn {{payout}} ₪ per wash. Keep up the great work to climb back up.

landing.heroTitle: A clean car, without leaving home
landing.tagline: Book a wash and a washer comes to your car. At home, at work, wherever it's parked.
landing.feature1: You pick the spot, we show up

intro.title: Hi, we're MULU 👋
intro.subtitle: We bring the next generation of car washing straight to your parking spot. No traffic, no lines, no leaving home.
intro.step1: Order a wash wherever suits you. Home, work, anywhere your car is parked.
intro.step2: A professional washer in your area sees the order, accepts it, and heads to your car.
intro.step3: Your car is photographed before and after, and the wash is only approved by us once it's clean and everything went smoothly.
intro.signoff: See you at the parking spot. The MULU team 💙
intro.chooseRole: How would you like to join?

firstWashGift.title: Congratulations! 🎉
firstWashGift.body: You've won {{percent}}% off your first wash. It's already waiting on your first order.

error.title: Something went wrong
error.message: An unexpected error occurred. Refresh the page to try again.

app.setupRequired: Setup required: copy .env.example to .env and add your Supabase credentials.

response.1: We're sorry your wash didn't meet your expectations. Our support team will reach out shortly.
response.2: Thank you. Where can we improve?
response.3: Thank you. Where can we improve?
response.4: We're glad you liked it! We'd love to hear how we could make it perfect.
response.5: We're glad you liked it. Thank you for using MULU!
